steps.title: Simplify absolute values when a is negative
steps.content:
Since $a \lt 0$, both $15a$ and $8a$ are negative. Therefore $|15a| = -15a$ and $|8a| = -8a$. Substituting into the function:
$$f(15a) = \frac{-15a}{a} - 14 = -15 - 14 = -29$$
$$f(8a) = \frac{-8a}{a} - 14 = -8 - 14 = -22$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $638$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $638$.
